## LibraryRuntime.IResolvedFillingIngredient interface

A resolved ingredient reference with full ingredient data and alternates. This is the primary interface for accessing recipe ingredients in the runtime layer.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IResolvedFillingIngredient<TIngredient extends IRuntimeIngredient = IRuntimeIngredient> 
```
